name: Ingushetia
description: A land of ancient tower complexes that reflect a rich historical legacy and the traditions of the highlanders

name: Chechnya
description: A land of majestic landscapes and iconic monuments, keeping the memory of a heroic past and distinctive culture

name: Dagestan
description: Of stunning nature: mountain rivers, gorges and azure waters where the cultures of many peoples intertwine

name: Kabardino-Balkaria
description: Combines architectural beauty and natural riches: from temple complexes to picturesque mountain landscapes

name: Karachay-Cherkessia
description: A region of breathtaking views and ancient fortresses that tell the story of the past

name: North Ossetia
description: A constituent region of the Russian Federation, part of the North Caucasus Federal District
